title: calea mediterranea
intro: Calea mediterranea, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Its medicinal properties lie in its ability to induce lucid dreaming, promote relaxation, and reduce anxiety, making it a popular choice for those seeking improved sleep quality. The health benefits of Calea mediterranea include improved sleep patterns, reduced stress levels, and enhanced cognitive function. Calea mediterranea is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and experience the associated health benefits.
